metrics.name: gateway_call_latency_ms
metrics.description: Latency of outbound calls to the external payments-gateway

metrics.name: gateway_timeout_ratio
metrics.description: Fraction of gateway calls that hit the 3s timeout

metrics.name: payments_api_retry_rate
metrics.description: Internal retry rate to the gateway (amplification)

metrics.name: payments_api_threadpool_utilization
metrics.description: Worker thread-pool utilization (saturates as calls block on the gateway)
